testcase.name: test_behaviour_observation_empty_data

failure.message: AssertionError: Empty data should not update any traits assert 2 == 0 + where 2 = len([{'evidence_count': 4, 'field': 'anxiety_triggers', 'observed_value': [], 'observer': 'test_observer'}, {'evidence_count': 4, 'field': 'fear_triggers', 'observed_value': [], 'observer': 'test_observer'}]) + where [{'evidence_count': 4, 'field': 'anxiety_triggers', 'observed_value': [], 'observer': 'test_observer'}, {'evidence_count': 4, 'field': 'fear_triggers', 'observed_value': [], 'observer': 'test_observer'}] = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfee0f9280940>('updated_traits', []) + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfee0f9280940> = {'pet_id': 'pet-e6348b13c975', 'pet_name': 'Lola', 'success': True, 'updated_traits': [{'evidence_count': 4, 'field': 'anxiety_triggers', 'observed_value': [], 'observer': 'test_observer'}, {'evidence_count': 4, 'field': 'fear_triggers', 'observed_value': [], 'observer': 'test_observer'}]}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_trait_graph_service.py:295: in test_behaviour_observation_empty_data assert len(data.get("updated_traits", [])) == 0, "Empty data should not update any traits" E AssertionError: Empty data should not update any traits E assert 2 == 0 E + where 2 = len([{'evidence_count': 4, 'field': 'anxiety_triggers', 'observed_value': [], 'observer': 'test_observer'}, {'evidence_count': 4, 'field': 'fear_triggers', 'observed_value': [], 'observer': 'test_observer'}]) E + where [{'evidence_count': 4, 'field': 'anxiety_triggers', 'observed_value': [], 'observer': 'test_observer'}, {'evidence_count': 4, 'field': 'fear_triggers', 'observed_value': [], 'observer': 'test_observer'}] = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfee0f9280940>('updated_traits', []) E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfee0f9280940> = {'pet_id': 'pet-e6348b13c975', 'pet_name': 'Lola', 'success': True, 'updated_traits': [{'evidence_count': 4, 'field': 'anxiety_triggers', 'observed_value': [], 'observer': 'test_observer'}, {'evidence_count': 4, 'field': 'fear_triggers', 'observed_value': [], 'observer': 'test_observer'}]}.get
